items.name: Calamari
items.description: Hand-breaded to order and served with our marinara and Ricardo sauces.

items.name: Tuscan Breadstick Tower
items.description: A towering stack of focaccia bread brushed in garlic butter and our signature herb mix, served with marinara sauce for dipping.

items.name: Four-Cheese & Sausage Stuffed Mushrooms
items.description: Stuffed with sausage, spinach, ricotta, parmesan, romano, mozzarella cheese and Italian breadcrumbs, served over our tomato cream sauce.

items.name: Meatballs & Ricotta
items.description: Two meatballs simmered in our pomodoro sauce with ricotta, parmesan and romano cheese.

items.name: Mozzarella Marinara
items.description: Hand-cut and breaded, served with our marinara sauce.

items.name: Zucchini Fritte
items.description: Hand-breaded, lightly fried and served with roasted garlic aioli.

items.name: Shrimp Scampi
items.description: Garlic, white wine and our lemon butter sauce served with toasted garlic and herb bread.

items.name: Jumbo Lump Crab Cakes
items.description: Two jumbo lump crab cakes seared, baked and served with roasted red pepper sauce.

items.name: Classics Combination
items.description: Calamari, Mozzarella Marinara and Bruschette Caprese, served with marinara sauce.

items.name: Tomato Caprese with Fresh Burrata
items.description: Creamy burrata mozzarella, tomatoes, fresh basil, red onions, balsamic glaze and extra-virgin olive oil.

items.name: Johnny Rocco Salad
items.description: Wood-grilled chicken, prosciutto, fontina, tomatoes, hard-boiled egg and green onions over mixed greens with our herb vinaigrette.

items.name: Caesar Salad
items.description: Wood-grilled chicken or shrimp served over romaine, croutons, parmesan and romano cheese with Caesar dressing.

items.name: Italian Salad
items.description: Wood-grilled chicken or shrimp served over romaine, garden vegetables, kalamata olives and Italian vinaigrette.

items.name: Signature Salads
items.description: House Creamy Parmesan, Italian, or Caesar.

items.name: Soup of the Day
items.description: Ask your server for today’s made-from-scratch selection.

items.name: Fettuccine Weesie
items.description: Fettuccine Alfredo with sautéed shrimp and mushrooms in our spicy lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Lobster Ravioli
items.description: Ravioli stuffed with lobster and romano in our white wine cream sauce, topped with diced tomatoes.

items.name: Lasagne
items.description: Pasta layered with meat sauce, ricotta, mozzarella and romano cheese, baked in marinara.

items.name: Linguine Positano
items.description: Crushed tomatoes, garlic, olive oil and basil tossed with linguine.

items.name: Filet & Shrimp Pasta Toscana
items.description: Fettuccine with spinach and mushrooms tossed in a roasted garlic cream sauce, topped with wood-grilled shrimp and wood-grilled filet.

items.name: Rigatoni Martino
items.description: Sautéed mushrooms, sun-dried tomatoes, parmesan and romano tossed with rigatoni in our tomato cream sauce, topped with scallions and ricotta salata.

items.name: Fettuccine Carrabba
items.description: Fettuccine Alfredo with wood-grilled chicken, sautéed mushrooms and peas.

items.name: Mezzaluna
items.description: Half-moon ravioli with chicken, ricotta, parmesan, romano cheese and spinach in our tomato cream sauce.

items.name: Shrimp & Scallop Linguine Alla Vodka
items.description: Sautéed shrimp and scallops tossed with linguine pasta in our tomato vodka sauce.

items.name: Chicken Trio
items.description: Chicken Bryan, Pollo Rosa Maria and Chicken Marsala, served with your choice of a side.

items.name: The Johnny Trio
items.description: Tuscan-grilled sirloin Marsala, Chicken Bryan and Mezzaluna.

items.name: Carrabba’s Italian Classics Trio
items.description: Chicken Parmesan, Lasagne and Fettuccine Alfredo.

items.name: Chicken Parmesan
items.description: Coated with Mama Mandola’s breadcrumbs, sautéed and topped with pomodoro sauce, parmesan, romano and mozzarella cheese.

items.name: Chicken Piccata
items.description: Thin, tender cutlets lightly dusted with flour, sautéed and topped with lemon butter sauce, parsley and capers.

items.name: Tuscan-Grilled Chicken
items.description: Wood-grilled and seasoned with Mr. C’s Grill Baste, olive oil and herbs.

items.name: Chicken Marsala
items.description: Wood-grilled and topped with mushrooms and our Lombardo Marsala wine sauce.

items.name: Pollo Rosa Maria
items.description: Wood-grilled chicken stuffed with fontina cheese and prosciutto, topped with mushrooms and basil lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Chicken Bryan
items.description: Wood-grilled and topped with goat cheese, sun-dried tomatoes, basil and lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Eggplant Parmesan
items.description: Layers of sliced eggplant coated with seasoned breadcrumbs and topped with pomodoro sauce, parmesan, romano and mozzarella cheese.

items.name: Marsala Sauce
items.description: Mushrooms and our Lombardo Marsala wine sauce.

items.name: Ardente Topping
items.description: Tomatoes, garlic, basil and melted gorgonzola cheese.

items.name: Bryan Topping
items.description: Goat cheese, sun-dried tomatoes, basil and lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Tuscan-Grilled Pork Chop
items.description: Tuscan-grilled pork chop (one or two chops).

items.name: Spiedino di Mare
items.description: Shrimp, sea scallops or a combination coated with Italian breadcrumbs, wood-grilled and topped with our lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Pistachio Crusted Trout
items.description: Wood-grilled trout coated with Italian breadcrumbs and pistachios, topped with lemon butter sauce, diced tomatoes and basil.

items.name: Simply Grilled Trout
items.description: Wood-grilled trout seasoned with Mr. C’s Grill Baste, olive oil and herbs.

items.name: Salmon Capperi
items.description: Wood-grilled salmon topped with roasted grape tomatoes, fresh basil, capers and lemon butter sauce.

items.name: Simply Grilled Salmon
items.description: Wood-grilled salmon seasoned with Mr. C’s Grill Baste, olive oil and herbs.

items.name: Flavored Iced Tea of the Day
items.description: Gold Peak iced tea flavored with one of our favorites (ask server for today’s options).

items.name: Soft Drinks
items.description: Coke, Diet Coke, Sprite, Hi-C, Dr Pepper, Minute Maid Lemonade.

items.name: Freshly Brewed Iced Tea
items.description: Gold Peak Tea (fresh brewed) and Iced Tea.

items.name: Italian Bottled Water
items.description: Acqua Panna Still or San Pellegrino Sparkling.

items.name: Sogno Di Cioccolata (Chocolate Dream)
items.description: A rich fudge brownie with chocolate mousse, fresh whipped cream and chocolate sauce.

items.name: Strawberry Cheesecake
items.description: Creamy New York-style cheesecake topped with strawberry purée.

items.name: Tiramisù
items.description: Lady fingers dipped in liqueur-laced espresso, layered with sweetened mascarpone, Myers’s Rum and chocolate shavings.

items.name: John Cole
items.description: Vanilla ice cream with caramel sauce and roasted cinnamon rum pecans.

items.name: Cannoli Cake for Two
items.description: Vanilla cake with layers of cannoli filling, topped with a mini cannoli, pistachios and chocolate sauce, with a chocolate chip crust.
